final_diagnosis.description: Final pathologic diagnosis translate in english

record_id_from_source.description: Extract record id from the report/source filename. It will look like TCELL or TCLA with a number before or after that pattern or just numbers like 12-123 with a number before or after that pattern

ebv_marker.description: extract information ebv marker in immunohistochemistrhy it could be named LMP1 (Latent Membrane Protein 1), EBNA1 / EBNA2 (Epstein-Barr Nuclear Antigen), BZLF1 / ZEBRA (Zta) — lytic phase marker, BMRF1 (EA-D) — early antigen lytic, VCA (Viral Capsid Antigen) or  LMP1, LMP2A, EBNA1, EBNA2, BZLF1/ZEBRA/Zta, BMRF1/EA-D, VCA, EBER-ISH (EBER1/EBER2)
